title: Great discovery

title: Same songs
content: My recommendations loop the same artists constantly.

title: Solid app
content: Search could surface smaller artists more easily.

title: Bad shuffle
content: Shuffle on liked songs repeats within an hour.

title: Mixed feelings
content: Daily mixes are good but radio stations feel stale.
